translations.en: Minax
translations.zh: 米娜克斯
translations.note: NPC name，邪惡三位一體之一，熱情之體現

translations.en: a stone statue of the evil witch Minax.
translations.zh: 邪惡女巫米娜克斯的石像。

translations.en: "For what dost thou return, Avatar?"
translations.zh: 「聖者，汝為何再度歸來？」

translations.en: You remember quite clearly how you defeated Minax in your second visit to Brittania.
translations.zh: 你清楚記得第二次造訪不列顛尼亞時，你是如何擊敗米娜克斯的。

translations.en: With a mighty sword blow, you slew the witch and destroyed her evil works.
translations.zh: 你以強力的一劍斬殺了這位女巫，摧毀了她的邪惡傑作。

translations.en: The statue speaks!
translations.zh: 石像開口了！

translations.en: "We meet again, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「我們再度相遇，聖者。」

translations.en: "Fear not! I have but one @task now, and am no threat."
translations.zh: 「無需畏懼！我如今只有一個@task使命，不再構成威脅。」

translations.en: "Surely you of all people would recognize me as Minax."
translations.zh: 「你更勝旁人，理當認得我是米娜克斯。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles have enshrined my spirit here as the embodiment of @passion."
translations.zh: 「魔像將吾之靈魂奉祀於此，作為@passion熱情之體現。」

translations.en: "I was once a mighty sorceress."
translations.zh: 「吾昔日乃一代強大女術士。」

translations.en: "Passion was the essence of my soul."
translations.zh: 「熱情乃吾靈魂之本質。」

translations.en: "But that passion knew no bounds."
translations.zh: 「然而那熱情毫無邊界。」

translations.en: "I wanted everything, and because of this strove to conquer all."
translations.zh: 「吾貪圖一切，因此矢志征服萬物。」

translations.en: "Passion must be directed, focused."
translations.zh: 「熱情必須有所導向，加以聚焦。」

translations.en: "Unbridled passion, desire for all things, leads only to chaos."
translations.zh: 「無節制的熱情、對萬物的渴望，只會帶來混亂。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles understand passion."
translations.zh: 「魔像深諳熱情之道。」

translations.en: "Their society is based on the passionate leading those who lack motivation."
translations.zh: 「其社會以熱情之人引導缺乏動力者為基礎。」

translations.en: "In this way, they have the will to struggle against their harsh world."
translations.zh: 「如此，他們才有意志與嚴酷的世界抗爭。」

translations.en: "I have no concern for matters such as $Z."
translations.zh: 「$Z之事，吾不關心。」

translations.en: "I am enshrined here in eternal contemplation of the principle of @passion."
translations.zh: 「吾永恆地奉祀於此，沉思@passion熱情之原則。」

translations.en: "I have no concern for matters such as $Z."
translations.zh: 「$Z之事，吾不關心。」

translations.en: "Contemplate what thou hast learned. Repeat after me the Mantra of Passion."
translations.zh: 「默想汝所習得之事。隨吾覆誦熱情真言。」
Or……

translations.en: "I can teach thee no more."
translations.zh: 「吾已無更多可教。」

translations.en: "Thy understanding is flawed. But I can teach thee no more."
translations.zh: 「汝之理解有所缺失。然吾已無更多可教。」

translations.en: "Farewell, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「別了，聖者。」

translations.en: "May thy @passion drive thy quest toward success."
translations.zh: 「願汝之@passion熱情驅策汝的使命邁向成功。」

translations.en: "Thou wilt need passion to succeed in thy quest, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「汝的使命需要熱情方能成功，聖者。」

translations.en: "But thou must limit thy passion, lest balance and order be lost."
translations.zh: 「然汝必須節制熱情，以免失去平衡與秩序。」

translations.en: "$0 @passion."
translations.zh: 「$0@passion熱情。」

translations.en: Thy deeds show nought but unlimited
translations.zh: 汝之行為顯示不過是無節制的

translations.en: Thy deeds show misguided but strong
translations.zh: 汝之行為顯示方向有誤但強烈的

translations.en: Thy deeds show the merits of thy
translations.zh: 汝之行為彰顯了汝之

translations.en: I admire thy deeds and thy
translations.zh: 吾欽佩汝之行為與汝之

translator_notes: 米娜克斯是U2反派，在魔像神殿中以熱情原則之體現的身份存在。真言「Or」保留英文。結構與蒙丹（189）平行，但強調熱情的節制而非操控的自律。
